task: Global Review and Debugging Gate runtime audit after CSS visual fixes

hypotheses.hypothesis: Static fallback and JS render may diverge, causing missing approved hero/nav/trust after reload.
hypotheses.result: ruled out: approved hero/nav/trust and branch count present after real browser load

hypotheses.hypothesis: Pet filter categories may not map to available photo cards, producing empty states.
hypotheses.result: ruled out: all seven filters have visible cards and hide empty state

hypotheses.hypothesis: Mobile fixed CTA or menu may fail at 390x844 and block content/navigation.
hypotheses.result: ruled out: fixed CTA, no horizontal overflow, and menu open state verified at mobile viewport

hypotheses.hypothesis: Generated graphic text may be clipped by image framing or hidden via low-contrast styling.
hypotheses.result: ruled out: generated graphics are contained/nonzero and contact light buttons use dark readable text

cleanup: no new server/browser process spawned by this audit
